items.name: Sony FE 100-400mm f/4.5 GM OSS
items.desc: The Sony FE 100-400mm f/4.5 GM OSS is a full-frame, super-telephoto zoom lens designed for wildlife, birding, sports, and journalism photography.

items.name: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
items.desc: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is a premium flagship smartphone designed for powerful performance, advanced AI features, and high-quality photography.

items.name: Sony ZV-E10 II
items.desc: The Sony ZV-E10 II is a mirrorless, crop-sensor, E-mount interchangeable-lens camera featuring an APS-C sized sensor.

items.name: Rode VideoMic GO II-H
items.desc: The Rode VideoMic GO II-H is a lightweight, compact on-camera microphone designed for content creators, filmmakers, and videographers.

items.name: Hollyland Lark M2 Combo
items.desc: The Hollyland Lark M2 Combo is a compact 2-person wireless microphone system designed for content creators, vloggers, mobile journalists, podcasters, and filmmakers.
